title: Easier Wood Creations
description: A mod that makes vanilla wood recipes more convenient and easier.
body:
A mod that makes vanilla wood recipes more convenient and easier, for example 8 oak logs, in the shape of a furnace recipe can make 4 chests easily. Another example is 3 logs in the shape of a normal slab recipe makes 24 slabs.

(Only supports vanilla logs so far)

Look at examples below to see how the mod works:

Example:
![oaktochest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wcqADavO/images/ba955ed8ec30948848f380c52ceb724d1de138a2.png)

Example:
![oaktoslab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wcqADavO/images/07be15aecab6fed64bd312431440547becf74c81.png)
Example:
![warper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wcqADavO/images/39ed2b522e07a192beea5f746f8e222cfd7233b6.png)
Example:
![warped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wcqADavO/images/3b81db72f049e43336ef9e5d92b11c3e11fdeb43.png)
